revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: remove obsolete category Japan weatherbox templates
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{Weather box |collapsed = Y |single line = Y |metric first = Y |location = [[:ja:石田町|Isida]], Iki (2003−2020 normals, extremes 2003−present) |Jan high C = 9.6 |Feb high C = 10.9 |Mar high C = 13.6 |Apr high C = 17.7 |May high C = 21.8 |Jun high C = 24.3 |Jul high C = 28.3 |Aug high C = 30.1 |Sep high C = 26.7 |Oct high C = 22.5 |Nov high C = 17.6 |Dec high C = 12.0 |Jan mean C = 6.4 |Feb mean C = 7.7 |Mar mean C = 10.4 |Apr mean C = 14.3 |May mean C = 18.4 |Jun mean C = 21.5 |Jul mean C = 25.5 |Aug mean C = 27.1 |Sep mean C = 24.1 |Oct mean C = 19.5 |Nov mean C = 14.3 |Dec mean C = 8.6 |Jan low C = 2.6 |Feb low C = 3.9 |Mar low C = 6.6 |Apr low C = 10.8 |May low C = 15.2 |Jun low C = 19.3 |Jul low C = 23.5 |Aug low C = 24.7 |Sep low C = 21.8 |Oct low C = 16.4 |Nov low C = 10.3 |Dec low C = 4.5 |Jan record high C = 19.0 |Feb record high C = 20.2 |Mar record high C = 22.7 |Apr record high C = 25.1 |May record high C = 29.1 |Jun record high C = 29.6 |Jul record high C = 33.9 |Aug record high C = 35.0 |Sep record high C = 33.6 |Oct record high C = 30.2 |Nov record high C = 24.6 |Dec record high C = 23.4 |year record high C= 35.0 |Jan record low C = -4.9 |Feb record low C = -5.6 |Mar record low C = -1.9 |Apr record low C = 1.8 |May record low C = 7.1 |Jun record low C = 12.3 |Jul record low C = 17.6 |Aug record low C = 17.7 |Sep record low C = 13.5 |Oct record low C = 7.3 |Nov record low C = 1.2 |Dec record low C = -2.7 |year record low C= -5.6 |precipitation colour = green |Jan precipitation mm = 65.7 |Feb precipitation mm = 75.4 |Mar precipitation mm = 116.5 |Apr precipitation mm = 137.9 |May precipitation mm = 141.2 |Jun precipitation mm = 257.3 |Jul precipitation mm = 327.3 |Aug precipitation mm = 249.0 |Sep precipitation mm = 150.2 |Oct precipitation mm = 106.5 |Nov precipitation mm = 90.9 |Dec precipitation mm = 80.0 |year precipitation mm= 1797.8 |unit rain days = 1.0 mm |Jan rain days = 7.8 |Feb rain days = 8.9 |Mar rain days = 9.2 |Apr rain days = 8.9 |May rain days = 8.1 |Jun rain days = 10.3 |Jul rain days = 11.0 |Aug rain days = 8.9 |Sep rain days = 9.8 |Oct rain days = 6.7 |Nov rain days = 8.0 |Dec rain days = 8.4 |source 1 = [[Japan Meteorological Agency|JMA]]<ref>{{cite web | url = https://www.data.jma.go.jp/obd/stats/etrn/view/rank_a.php?prec_no=84&block_no=1478&year=&month=&day=&view=h0 |script-title=ja:観測史上1～10位の値（年間を通じての値） | publisher = [[Japan Meteorological Agency|JMA]] | access-date = February 17, 2022}}</ref> |source 2 = [[Japan Meteorological Agency|JMA]]<ref>{{cite web | url = https://www.data.jma.go.jp/obd/stats/etrn/view/nml_amd_ym.php?prec_no=84&block_no=1478&year=&month=12&day=&view=h0 |script-title=ja:気象庁 / 平年値（年・月ごとの値） | publisher = [[Japan Meteorological Agency|JMA]] | access-date = February 17, 2022}}</ref>}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
